mapper.update:
UPDATE TBL_USER
nickname = #{nickname},
address = #{address},
WHERE user_id = #{user_id}
mapper.select: SELECT hashtag_id, hashtag_name FROM tbl_hashtag_list WHERE hashtag_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' ORDER BY hashtag_name
mapper.update: MERGE INTO tbl_user_aspect t USING (SELECT #{userId} AS user_id, #{hashtagId} AS hashtag_id FROM dual) s ON (t.user_id = s.user_id AND t.hashtag_id = s.hashtag_id) WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (user_id, hashtag_id) VALUES (s.user_id, s.hashtag_id)
